item.title: Refresh - a comic about burnout
item.description: When I started working from home, I was comfy and happy in my jammies, I got to cook my lunch in my own kitchen, and I got to spend all day with my cat. However, I quickly realized I don't hate people as much as I thought I did and started to spin into a depressive state. I changed jobs, traveled a tiny bit, and things got a lot better. Thus, comic inspiration was born! :) Thanks for reading
item.dc:creator: sleepyheadkl

item.title: A country founded on racism, sexism, and genocide.
item.dc:creator: neoswhiterabbitt

item.title: Living my best life as a medieval peasant
item.description:
I recently visited Evermore Park in Pleasant Grove, Utah. This is a permanent park that is a perfect blend of Renaissance Faire and Live Action Role Play
Guests are encouraged to come in character and in costume! My name was Juniper. I just needed something to wear…
I’ve always wanted to learn to sew and make costumes and used the pandemic to really dive in. Both corsets and skirts were handmade by me!
The green was my first attempt and I’m so proud of it! Not perfect and my skills were definitely more refined by the navy one.
Evermore park also had a statue in their church graveyard of Saint Apollonia. The patron saint of teeth, which was so perfect for me because I’m a dental hygienist! See her forceps? Guests leave offerings to her for fortune and favor for good teeth.
This park is beautiful. So much love is put into it by the actors. It’s also ridiculously affordable, I would have easily paid triple the price for admission. You interact with characters to go on quests to earn gold and other treasures. One wizard told our fortunes from Pokémon Cards!
These are some of my treasures I won in the park. A dragon’s tear from the dragon trainers guild, a special gold doubloon from the pirates, a ruby, a key to the inn so we would always have a place to stay if we came back to Evermore, a ring from the finger of a fairy, and I kept one of the pieces of gold which is just painted rocks. I gave the rest of my gold back to the Evermore actors to recycle to new guests.
This is the Pigmyweed’s Inn, if you give the dwarf innkeeper Fergus 3 pieces of gold he will sing you a song. Since I visited the dragon trainers guild (which I joined) got a huge lifelike dragon! And they have baby dragons. There’s also jousts, archery, axe throwing, and more!
Stop in their attached restaurant and bar called Vander’s Keep. There I had some of the best venison of my life and amazing cocktails.
We were there on Fairy weekend when they had a lantern festival. You can choose to join the guild of fairies, pirates, knights, dragon trainers, and more!
TLDR - Go LARP in Utah FRONT PAGE EDIT: my goodness thank you guys so much! I’ve gotten lots of questions on what patterns I used and how to start sewing. I used Butterick 4669 as a base for the corset bodice. I had to modify it to fit my smaller bust, added the boning channels to give it structure just by eyeballing it, and enclosed the edges with bias tape - that part was all hand sewn because ✨I hate myself✨For the bones themselves I used a classic costumer’s trick of industrial strength zip ties. I taught myself how to sew through lots of YouTube. Rachel Maksy, Morgan Donner, and Bernadette Banner are my favorite sewing/costuming youtubers. No the corset is not uncomfortable and does not make it hard to breathe. It’s well fitted and tailored for me so it fits close but is not stifling. Big poofy sleeves and full skirts give the optical illusion of a small waist. It’s all about the silhouette. Happy sewing and costuming! And for everyone in the comments coming after me for not being “historically accurate” clearly I’m not trying to be. I was riddling with wizards and collecting moss from fairies for gods sake. “Medieval” encompasses a time frame of literally a thousand years (5th to 15th centuries CE) There is no such thing as 100% historical accuracy because we have such little documentation of historical and extant garments. What we do know is that people of all classes and time periods loved colors and patterns. Clearly this is fantasy and fun. Let people enjoy things
item.dc:creator: faelurian

item.title: If you are travelling this summer…
item.description:
My friend is a flight attendant. She shared this post on her feed and I wanted to share it with you all.
My husband and I are travelling this summer from Canada to Europe with our niece. Starting to have second thoughts.
If you have any post-COVID travel stories, I’d like to hear them!
Travel safely!
item.dc:creator: ninjasenseivalkyrieprincess

item.title: Captain Carter Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here, wanted to share these shots from my Captain Carter shoot.
Went out and did these yesterday, pretty stoked about how they turned out.
Kind of a weird cosplay for me to do, I’m more into characters like Catwoman lately. But I’d always wanted to cosplay Captain America, and after seeing Hayley Atwell as Captain Carter in Doctor Strange, I figured it would work.
I wanna weather the spats for next time I wear them, but I’m stoked about the rest of the suit.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: I missed my Imgur cake day yesterday, but today is my being born cake day so have a dump
item.description:
I found all three of them
That's why you add zombies. How did the movie fuck it up that badly?
Khajiit has found the moon sugar. Khajiit will now roll on the floor and beg for belly skritches
Stay in the right fucking order! How many times do I have to rearrange images before you stay where I put you?!
I can't even tell you how many times I have an anxiety attack and I just go "oh, this is happening. Okay, back to what I was doing" I'm sure that's not a good thing, but I'm an American so it's not like I can afford to do anything about it
Or they just talk over you
Maybe if I say it enough I'll believe it
My sorcerer made it through the entire campaign wearing slacks and a button-down shirt. Well except for costume changes for the one or two fancy parties to steal stuff. I mean, we totally didn't rob that mansion. We were just innocent party guests
I could see our current party doing this. We did just kinda accidentally, maybe on purpose start a revolution and overthrow an incompetent lord. Technically all we suggested was that since the lord and his cronies were currently drugged and out of it, now would be a good time for the starving peasantry to go loot the castle and the mob just took over from there while we ran away
Phil-ip
I've been trying CBD oil for my anxiety. It helps
I swear I saw a comic book like this years ago but it was all of Zeus' bastard kids running around causing chaos
Our sorceress does like her fire spells
Hey, I finally accomplished my daily goals
There's still six more sins that need to gay
I do cuss a lot at work. But not in front of the big boss
item.dc:creator: LogicKitty

item.title: Cake Day Stolen Meme Dummy Dump Truck Express
item.description:
Utterly horrible
Quarantine was a great time for us
Also rocks
Afraid of being alone forever, afraid to open up to someone
HONK
Please guys
Enough said
Can't leave out the one birthday meme
Every word is a struggle
One of the best things to hear
item.dc:creator: SlightlyBothered
